Guide: HOW TO RECORD PROGRESS REPORT SCORES
In order to record the scores of progress report,
go to "Classes"
click on the ordinal number of any kid you want to record the scores
For example, you click on "15" of K1 from 3:00 to 5:00 if you want to record the score for "Phy Sorphea"
now as you reach the page for "Phy Sorphea", you can record the score
after you do so, you should click right mose on the left scroller " < " at the bottom left in order to go back to "Classes"
when you click right mose on the left scroller " < " at the bottom left, the Activate boad appears
click on "Classes" and then "OK"

Guide: SCORE SHEET for KID PROGRAM
Beside teaching, evaluating learners' performance is necessary.
For the student performance evaluation at our center, we have score sheet as a tool for our teachers to record their kids' performance
including class participation, oral or written work and exams, and other activities such as projects and presentations.
Our score sheet file contains 7 main worksheets as follows:
(1). Classes is where you can add more kids when they are officially allowed to move in and correct the kid's name in terms of speeling
(2). Midterm Daily is the score sheet for teacher to record students' daily scores in the period of midterm's time
(3). Midterm Exam is for teacher to record the scores of Midterm exam
(4). Midterm Results is a worksheet which covers both midterm daily scores and midterm exam scores
(5). Promotion Daily is the score sheet for teacher to record students' daily socres in the period of promotion's time
(6). Promotion Exam is for teacher to record the scores of Promotion exam
(7). Promotion Results is the worksheet that covers all scores from Midterm Daily to Promotion Exam.
The operation below shows how to use each worksheet along with some examples of problems frequently happen and solutions for them
OPERATION
(1). Classes
Below is a class of K1 from 8:00 to 10:00 in the morning. From the beginning, this class has 10 kids from KID 1 to KID 10.
Later on, the office allows one new kid to move in. The TEACHER adds her after KID 10 in the (1).Classes worksheet.
(2). Midterm Daily
Why are KID 2, KID 5, and KID 9 incomplete?
KID 2 is incomplete because the TEACHER misses his Sprouts score. You should give 0 like KID 3 if he doesn't do it.
KID 5 is incomplete because the TEACHER misses his Science and Tracing scores. If he changes time, you should mark Change like KID 6.
KID 9 is incomplete because the TEACHER misses her scores of Phonics, Math, Shape, Science, and Tracing scores. If she stops, you
should mark Stop like KID 10.
Û
Please use only the terms "Change" or "Stop" given to mark your students in case they change time or stop and other cases alike.
(3). Midterm Exam
Why are KID 3 and KID 7 incomplete?
KID 3 is incomplete because he did not take midterm exam. If he stops, you should mark Stop like KID 4.
KID 7 is incomplete because she misses two tests of midterm exam - Science and Tracing. He asks for permission and will come back to
do them later, so you should mark Late Exam like KID 8.
Û
Please use only the terms "Stop" or "Late Exam" given to mark your students in case they stop or will do midterm exam later.
(4). Midterm Results
Midterm result worksheet is designed for our students to see the results of their study for around three months.
Midterm result covers both midterm daily score and midterm exam score.
We consider the total of midterm daily score as 20% and the total of midterm exam score as 80%, so the total score of midterm result is
100%. Please have a look at the formula as follows:
Midterm Result
Midterm dialy
Midterm exam
TOTAL
(5). Promotion Daily (the same as Midterm Daily)
(6). Promotion Exam (the same as Promotion Exam)
(7). Promotion Results
Unlike midterm result, the promotion result covers all scores from midterm daily to promotion exam.
It is a fact that promotion result is the final score of the combination of midterm scores and promotion scores.
The calculation of the promotion result or final score is as follows:
Midterm daily + Midterm exam        Promotion daily + Promotion exam

Our score sheet is designed to show only integers, not decimals.
However, our teachers are required to record the real scores.
The real score, here, means the score that a student gets from an assignment, a quiz, or a test.
Please do not worry about how it appears.
